Localization.Description: PT NAD detected signs of a hacker tool

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: PT NAD rule "{object.name}" and MaxPatrol SIEM rule "{reason}" were triggered on host {src.ip}, which indicates possible use of a hacker tool
PT NAD on host {event_src.host} detected on host {dst.ip} signs of hacker tool "{object.name}" being used from host {src.ip}
